step_rationale: ApoB-lipoprotein variant with independent atherosclerotic and thrombotic risk; retained in intima and oxidized.
mechanism: Lipoprotein(a) is an ApoB-containing lipoprotein retained in the subendothelial intima where it undergoes oxidative modification; its apo(a) moiety confers independent prothrombotic and pro-inflammatory effects that accelerate atherothrombotic MI.
